resources.string: @string/toolbar_menu_main_remove_from_list
No files here yet
No docs here yet
Create or upload new files
No forms here yet
No forms in this folder yet
No finished forms yet
No files in this folder yet
Nothing here yet
Upload a ready PDF form
The forms uploaded by the administrators will be appeared here.
This section will display all forms that are complete.
Here you will find forms which have been completely filled out by other users.
This section will display the forms in progress.
Here you will find forms in progress, i.e., forms which users have started to fill out but haven\'t completed.
No items here yet
Deleted files and folders go to Trash, where you can restore or permanently delete them. Items are auto-deleted after 30 days and cannot be recovered once removed from Trash.
Create your first room to get started.
There are no rooms here yet
The shared rooms will appear here.
Archive unused rooms and restore them anytime in your DocSpace, or delete them permanently. Archived rooms will appear here.
Rooms that have been archived will appear here.
Create a template from a room in the Rooms section.
No templates found
Create your first room template and then you can create new rooms based on it.
View recently opened files shared with you via external links here.
Operation canceled
For the best experience, try turning off VPN. Some server features may not work properly.
Welcome to the Public room
Create or upload new files or folders to get started.
The room is empty
Files and folders created or uploaded by admins will show up here.
Upload a ready PDF form to get started.
PDF forms uploaded by admins will show up here.
Welcome to the Virtual Data Room
Create or upload new files to get started.
Welcome to the Collaboration room
Welcome to the Custom room
Select Locked Cells
Select Unlocked Cells
Format Cells
Format Columns
Format Rows
Insert Columns
Insert Rows
Insert Hyperlink
Delete Columns
Delete Rows
Sort
Use AutoFilter
Use PivotTable and PivotChart
Edit Objects
Edit Scenarios
Prevent unwanted changes from others by limiting their ability to edit.
Allow all users of this sheet to
To prevent other users from viewing hidden worksheets, adding, moving, deleting, or hiding worksheets and renaming worksheets, you can protect the structure of your workbook with a password.
ON for me
OFF for me
ON for me & everyone
OFF for me & everyone
The document is opened with the Track Changes mode enabled
Enable track changes for everyone?
Track Changes will be switched ON for all users with full access. The next time anyone opens the doc, Track Changes will remain enabled.
Enable
Accept change
Reject change
Word counter
Line numbers
Options
None
Continuous
Restart each page
Restart each section
From text
Count by
Suppress line numbers
Delete Table of contents
Sheet is protected, changes are blocked. Unlock the sheet to edit.
Found an error in the formula entered. Invalid number of arguments.
The value entered does not match the format of the field.
Unknown error.
Error code: %1$d
Conversion timeout exceeded.
An error has occurred while opening the file
An error has occurred while saving the file
Download failed.
Maximum image size limit exceeded.
Unknown image format.
No images uploaded.
Cannot change part of a merged cell
Found an error in the formula entered.\nWrong count of brackets.
An error in the entered formula. Wrong operator is used.\nPlease correct the error or cancel the formula editing.
Found an error in the formula entered.\nCount of arguments exceeded.
Found an error in the formula entered.\nIncorrect formula name.
Internal error while the formula parsing.
Found an error in the formula entered.\nIncorrect arguments range.
The entered function syntax is not correct. Please check if you are missing one of the parentheses - \'(\' or \')\'.
The function refers to a sheet that does not exist.\nPlease check the data and try again.
External error.\nUnexpected Guid. Please, contact support.
External error.\nDatabase connection error. Please, contact support.
External error.\nFile Request. Please, contact support.
External error.\nIncorrect security key. Please, contact support.
Incorrect row order. To build a stock chart place the data on the sheet in the following order:\nopening price, max price, min price, closing price.
ERROR! The maximum number of data series per chart is 255.
To create a combination chart, select at least two series of data.
Incorrect data range.
The maximum number of points in series per chart is 4096.
The document security token is not correctly formed.\nPlease contact your Document Server administrator.
The document security token has expired.\nPlease contact your Document Server administrator.
Count of users was exceeded
Can\'t change a part of merged cell
Image url is incorrect
Connection is lost. You can still view the document,\nbut will not be able to download or print until the connection is restored and page is reloaded.
The file is password protected and cannot be opened.
The operation could not be done for the selected range of cells.\nSelect a uniform data range inside or outside the table and try again.
The operation could not be done for the selected cells as you cannot move a part of the table.\nSelect another data range so that the whole table was shifted and try again.
The operation is not allowed, as it is attempting to shift cells in a table on your worksheet.
The operation cannot be performed because the area contains filtered cells.\nPlease unhide the filtered elements and try again.
Could not fill the selected range of cells.\nAll the merged cells need to be the same size.
The file cannot be accessed right now.
Enter a correct name for the selection or a valid reference to go to.
The existing named ranges cannot be edited and the new ones cannot be created\nat the moment as some of them are being edited.
The copy and paste area does not match. Please select an area with the same size or click the first cell in a row to paste the copied cells.
The operation could not be done as the sheet has been locked by another user.
The document could not be saved. Please check connection settings or contact your administrator.\nWhen you click the \"OK\" button, you will be prompted to download the document.
The sheet cannot be renamed at the moment as it is being renamed by another user
The length of one of the formulas in the file exceeded\nthe allowed number of characters and it was removed.
This command cannot be used with multiple selections.\nSelect a single range and try again.
Unfortunately, it\'s not possible to print more than 1500 pages at once in the current version of the program.\nThis restriction will be eliminated in upcoming releases.
The document editing session has expired. Please reload the page.
The document has not been edited for quite a long time. Please reload the page.
The connection to the server has been interrupted. Please reload the page.
You are trying to perform an action you do not have rights for.\nPlease contact your Document Server administrator.
You cannot change data inside a pivot table.
To create a pivot table report, you must use data that is organized as a list with labeled columns.
A pivot table report cannot overlap a table.
An error occurred while saving the file. Please use the \"Download as\" option to save the file to your computer hard drive or try again later.
Submit failed.
Encrypted changes have been received, they cannot be deciphered.
An error occurred during the work with the document.\nUse the \"Download as…\" option to save the file backup copy to your computer hard drive.
You cannot change part of an array.
Multi-cell array formulas are not allowed in tables.
No email client could be found
No data was selected to parse.
Cannot ungroup. To start an outline, select the detail rows or columns and group them.
Text values in formulas are limited to 255 characters.\nUse the CONCATENATE function or concatenation operator (&)
You cannot enter this formula because it has too many values,\ncell references, and/or names.
The value you entered is not valid.\nA user has restricted values that can be entered into this cell.

Connection has been restored, and the file version has been changed.\nBefore you can continue working, you need to download the file or copy its content to make sure nothing is lost, and then reload this page.
Operation could not be completed for the selected cell range.\nSelect a range so that the first table row was on the same row and the resulting table overlapped the current one.
Operation could not be completed for the selected cell range.\nSelect a range which does not include other tables.
Table slicers cannot be copied from one workbook to another.
No duplicate values found.
You cannot add this formula as its length exceeded the allowed number of characters.\nPlease edit it and try again.
Table slicers cannot be copied from one workbook to another.\nTry again by selecting the entire table and the slicers.
The existing sheet view cannot be edited and the new ones cannot be created at the moment as some of them are being edited.
This will change a filtered range on your worksheet.\nTo complete this task, please remove AutoFilters.
Password could not be set.
Start creating a table of contents by applying a heading style from the Styles gallery to the selected text.
There\'s no table of contents to update. You can insert one from the References tab.
The selected chart type requires the secondary axis that an existing chart is using. Select another chart type.
Cannot group that selection.
This action cannot be done on a multiple range selection.\nSelect a single range and try again.
The Pivot Table report was saved without the underlying data.\nUse the \"Refresh\" button to update the report.
The cell or chart you are trying to change is on a protected sheet.\nTo make a change, unprotect the sheet. You might be requested to enter a password.
Location reference is not valid because the cells are not all in the same column or row.\nSelect cells that are all in a single column or row.
The reference for the location or data range is not valid.
The password you supplied is not correct.\nVerify that the CAPS LOCK key is off and be sure to use the correct capitalization.
Maximum document size limit exceeded.
Unknown document format.
No documents uploaded.

You are trying to delete a column that contains a locked cell. Locked cells cannot be deleted while the worksheet is protected.\nTo delete a locked cell, unprotect the sheet. You might be requested to enter a password.

You are trying to delete a row that contains a locked cell. Locked cells cannot be deleted while the worksheet is protected.\nTo delete a locked cell, unprotect the sheet. You might be requested to enter a password.
Fonts are not loaded.\nPlease contact your Document Server administrator.
Formula filled only first %1$d rows by memory save reason. Other rows in this sheet don\'t have data.
You cannot use this command on a protected sheet. To use this command, unprotect the sheet.\nYou might be requested to enter a password.
Please verify the link to the document.\nThis link must be a direct link to the file for downloading.
An error has occurred while opening the file.\nThe file content does not match the file extension.
Track Changes
Display Mode
Protect
Protect Workbook
Protect Sheet
Unprotect Workbook
Unprotect Sheet
Locked Cell
Hidden Formulas
Shape Locked
Lock Text
Failed to disable protection
Edit, analyze, and create content with ease. To get started — connect a model.
Whole words
Edit table
Edit text
AI settings
Here you can adjust settings or add new AI models anytime.
Got it
AI Assistant
Delete Shape
Delete Link
Delete Chart
Delete
Comment or mention with + or @
Recommended
Column
Line
Pie
Bar
Area
Stock
XY (Scatter)
Radar
Combo
